_comment: Machine-readable license policy for Vibe Payroll Time (PolyForm Internal Use License 1.0.0). Mirrors the TB and MB policies so the three products stay in sync.

knownIssues.pulledInBy: vite (dev dependency — never shipped to users)
knownIssues.action: Acceptable. CC-BY-4.0 is a data/creative-works license. This package is build-time only and not bundled into the application. No attribution required in shipped code.
knownIssues.notes: Dev dependency only. Does not affect runtime or distribution.

knownIssues.action: Accept MIT. Inspected node_modules/thirty-two/LICENSE.txt — standard MIT text from Chris Umbel. license-checker reports MIT* because the SPDX string is not in package.json.
knownIssues.notes: Runtime dep of the kiosk PIN flow. Safe.

licenseFile.status: PRESENT — full PolyForm Internal Use License 1.0.0 text with Kisaes LLC licensor preamble

commercialLicenseFile.status: PRESENT — reseller / client-portal tier described separately so the internal-use terms in LICENSE stay unambiguous

noticeFile.status: PRESENT — copyright, attribution, and third-party notices

sourceHeaders.status: ENFORCED — every first-party source file carries the PolyForm header; check-license-headers.sh runs in npm run check and as a lint-staged pre-commit hook.
sourceHeaders.note: PolyForm Internal Use requires that licensing notices not be removed or obscured where present. Extensions covered: .ts, .tsx, .js, .jsx, .mjs, .cjs, .sql, .sh, .py.

noDistribution.status: ENFORCED — PolyForm Internal Use prohibits distribution of the software
noDistribution.note: Distribution restriction is a core term of the license. LICENSE-COMMERCIAL.md covers the separately-negotiated commercial tier.
